narrative: A Senior Applied Scientist at Niramai, a product-first company, with 9 years of experience, ranked #2 out of 100 for the Senior AI/ML Engineer role. The primary driver of this ranking is their exceptional verified skill depth. Their background aligns well with the JD, particularly in Search Infrastructure and NLP. However, their location in Kolkata may pose a challenge, as the role is based in Pune or Noida. A minor concern is also flagged regarding their profile credibility, which may require further verification during the hiring process.
